title: Alphabet, Phonics & Early Reading
subject: English Language Arts & Literacy
description: Learn letter sounds, A-Z phonics, sight words, and early reading through fun stories and rhymes.
learningObjectives: Recognize uppercase and lowercase letters from A to Z.
Read simple 3-letter CVC words (cat, dog, sun, log).

lessons.title: Letter Sounds & Phonics
lessons.content: Letter 'A' says /a/ as in Apple! Letter 'B' says /b/ as in Bear! Letter 'C' says /k/ as in Cat! Practice saying letter sounds aloud every day.

lessons.title: Blending 3-Letter Words
lessons.content: Put sounds together! /c/ + /a/ + /t/ = CAT! /d/ + /o/ + /g/ = DOG! /s/ + /u/ + /n/ = SUN! When you blend sounds together, you are reading!

flashcards.definition: Learning the sounds that letters make.
The set of 26 letters used to write words.
Combining individual letter sounds to read a whole word.

questions.question: Which letter sound does the word 'SUN' start with?
If you blend the sounds /d/ + /o/ + /g/, what word do you get?

practicalChallenge.title: A-Z Letter Sound Scavenger Hunt
practicalChallenge.instruction: Find 3 objects around your home: something starting with 'A' (Apple), something starting with 'B' (Book), and something starting with 'C' (Cup)!
